items.title: Slay the Spire: The Board Game — Downfall Expansion Kickstarter Live
items.summary: The Kickstarter for Downfall, an official expansion for Slay the Spire: The Board Game, is now live. The campaign brings the community mod's content to the tabletop release.

items.title: The Neowsletter — March 2026
items.summary: Mega Crit's March Neowsletter thanks the community for launch feedback and shares early reactions from the team.

items.title: Patch Notes — Beta v0.99
items.summary: Patch v0.99 delivers bug fixes, a few art updates, and a new max-HP cap; initially rolling out to select platforms.

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes — v0.98.1
items.summary: Day-one hotfix fixes reported issues and softlocks; players are encouraged to submit in-game feedback.

items.title: r/slaythespire — fetch error
items.summary: Scrape error: Reddit blocked access to the r/slaythespire feed (HTTP 403).

items.title: Reddit search — fetch error
items.summary: Scrape error: Reddit blocked access to the search RSS (HTTP 403).

items.summary: Mega Crit's original announcement post for Slay the Spire 2.

items.summary: Mega Crit posted about the Youtooz limited-edition Slay the Spire figures release.
